name: Bicentennial Park Pickleball Courts
description: Bicentennial Park Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, OH. There are 3 outdoor asphalt and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.
hours: Monday to Friday 7:30 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. Government Websites by Catalis | Privacy Policy

name: Burton Park
description: Come play pickleball at Burton Park in Mansfield, OH! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Lakewood Racquet Club
description: Lakewood Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Mansfield, OH. There are 6 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water.

name: Ontario Ohio Health and Fitness Center
description: Ontario Ohio Health and Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in Ontario, OH. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Seltzer Park
description: Seltzer Park is a place to play pickleball in Shelby, OH. There are 3 outdoor concrete and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Sterkel Park
description: The park includes a pavilion, picnic tables and grills, 3 pickleball courts and a multi-purpose field, ground-level play equipment for children of all abilities, an outdoor fitness area, a 26-foot-tall Sky Tower activity center for kids ages 5 and older, play equipment and a nature play area for children 2 years and older, a challenge obstacle course for teenagers and adults, and a year-round, mile-long walking path.
hours: Monday through Friday, 8:00 am – 4:00 pm CLOSED Saturday, Sunday, and legal Holidays Parks Superintendent: Mike Woogerd City of Mansfield | 30 North Diamond St. | Mansfield, OH 44902 Jodie Perry, Mayor

name: Stowell Park
description: Stowell Park is a place to play pickleball in Ontario, OH. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets.

name: YMCA of North Central Ohio-Mansfield
description: YMCA of North Central Ohio-Mansfield is a place to play pickleball in Mansfield, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Temporarily closed from Friday, June 20 through Wednesday, July 2 for floor resurfacing and hoop maintenance.

name: YMCA of North Central Ohio-Shelby
description: YMCA of North Central Ohio-Shelby is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Shelby, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
